title: Genre Confusion
style: Country groove metal Drop D tuning 160 BPM E minor fast aggressive southern metal punk energy banjo shredding heavy drums
lyrics:
[INTRO fast aggressive riff with banjo shredding]

[VERSE 1]
Radio don't know where to put us on the dial

Metal heads think we've lost our minds
Mixing genres crossing all the lines

Genre confusion, genre confusion
Nobody knows what to call this illusion
We're cowboys with distortion, rednecks with speed

Genre confusion
Genre confusion
